form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after three months 2nd of 8 at Durbanville on March 18 over 1600m, head behind Boogiefied with 50kg at $11. Previously second-up ran last of 7 at this track on December 21 over 1800m, 30 len behind Noble Hero carrying 60kg at $3.50. Improver with winning prospects.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-6). Second run back. First-up after three months 2nd of 8 at Durbanville on March 18 over 1600m, head behind Boogiefied with 50kg at $11. Previously second-up ran last of 7 at this track on December 21 over 1800m, 30 len behind Noble Hero carrying 60kg at $3.50. Improver with winning prospects.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after three months 4th of 7 at this track on April 1 over 1400m, 2 len behind It Is My Time with 59.5kg at $4.80. Previously second-up won by 0.5 len at this track November 10 over 1400m defeating Givethatmanabells carrying 57kg at $6.50. Worth consideration.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Second-up. First-up after three months 4th of 7 at this track on April 1 over 1400m, 2 len behind It Is My Time with 59.5kg at $4.80. Previously second-up won by 0.5 len at this track November 10 over 1400m defeating Givethatmanabells carrying 57kg at $6.50. Worth consideration.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At the finish, raced on the inside of Gallic Victor.
At the 200m, directed outwards and into clear running.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Resuming 3rd of 10 at Durbanville on February 14 over 1400m, 1.75 len behind Boogiefied carrying 58.5kg at $9. Second-up 4th of 7 at Durbanville on March 21 over 1400m, 3 len behind King's Quest with 58.5kg at $5. Should go well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-4.5). Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Resuming 3rd of 10 at Durbanville on February 14 over 1400m, 1.75 len behind Boogiefied carrying 58.5kg at $9. Second-up 4th of 7 at Durbanville on March 21 over 1400m, 3 len behind King's Quest with 58.5kg at $5. Should go well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hanging out from the 300m and proved difficult to assist from the 100m.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. At the latest run 3rd of 11 at Durbanville on March 25 over 1600m, 0.7 len behind Prairie Dawn with 56kg at $4. The run before that 4th of 13 at this track on January 31 over 2000m, 4.5 len behind Note To Self with 58.5kg at $13.50. Good job last start and has top-three aspirations.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Form hard to fault. At the latest run 3rd of 11 at Durbanville on March 25 over 1600m, 0.7 len behind Prairie Dawn with 56kg at $4. The run before that 4th of 13 at this track on January 31 over 2000m, 4.5 len behind Note To Self with 58.5kg at $13.50. Good job last start and has top-three aspirations.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At the 1000m, following Diogenes and had to be steadied briefly.

form.formComment: Returns from a 52-day let-up. Most recently 2nd of 10 at this track on February 22 over 1400m, 1.75 len behind District Master carrying 61.5kg at $7.50. The race before that second last of 9 at Durbanville on January 17 over 1400m, 6 len behind Sommerstern with 58.5kg at $4.30. Can improve again. Top chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3). Returns from a 52-day let-up. Most recently 2nd of 10 at this track on February 22 over 1400m, 1.75 len behind District Master carrying 61.5kg at $7.50. The race before that second last of 9 at Durbanville on January 17 over 1400m, 6 len behind Sommerstern with 58.5kg at $4.30. Can improve again. Top chance.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Last start 2nd of 11 at Durbanville on March 25 over 1600m, head behind Prairie Dawn with 57.5kg at $11. The run before that 4th of 9 at Durbanville on March 4 over 1400m, 3 len behind King's Quest carrying 58kg at $3. Further improvement is anticipated.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Racing well recently. Last start 2nd of 11 at Durbanville on March 25 over 1600m, head behind Prairie Dawn with 57.5kg at $11. The run before that 4th of 9 at Durbanville on March 4 over 1400m, 3 len behind King's Quest carrying 58kg at $3. Further improvement is anticipated.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Contacted by Nightrain shortly after the start.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. First-up ran last of 15 at this track on January 31 over 1600m, 13 len behind Foudre with 58.5kg at $41. Last start 3rd of 8 at Durbanville on March 18 over 1600m, 1.2 len behind Spirit Of Levana with 57.4kg at $5. Thereabouts last start but looks tested this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3.5). Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. First-up ran last of 15 at this track on January 31 over 1600m, 13 len behind Foudre with 58.5kg at $41. Last start 3rd of 8 at Durbanville on March 18 over 1600m, 1.2 len behind Spirit Of Levana with 57.4kg at $5. Thereabouts last start but looks tested this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At the 100m, rolled outwards and made slight contact with Baton Rouge.
At the 400m, brushed by Blind Date.
Hanging out and shifted out from the 300m to the finish.

form.formComment: At the latest run 8th of 11 at Durbanville on March 25 over 1600m, 5 len behind Prairie Dawn with 56kg at $11. The race before that 8th of 13 at this track on January 31 over 2000m, 7 len behind Note To Self carrying 58.5kg at $17. Likely to struggle.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). At the latest run 8th of 11 at Durbanville on March 25 over 1600m, 5 len behind Prairie Dawn with 56kg at $11. The race before that 8th of 13 at this track on January 31 over 2000m, 7 len behind Note To Self carrying 58.5kg at $17. Likely to struggle.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Made contact with War Chariot leaving the stalls.

form.formComment: Most recently 6th of 11 at Durbanville on March 25 over 1600m, 3 len behind Prairie Dawn with 58kg at $17. The run before that 6th of 9 at this track on February 25 over 1600m, 6 len behind In A Timely Manner carrying 58.5kg at $34. Prefer to watch at this stage.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Most recently 6th of 11 at Durbanville on March 25 over 1600m, 3 len behind Prairie Dawn with 58kg at $17. The run before that 6th of 9 at this track on February 25 over 1600m, 6 len behind In A Timely Manner carrying 58.5kg at $34. Prefer to watch at this stage.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Jumped outwards and made contact with Katsu. Bumped by Katsu.
